questions.question: Describe the Banker's algorithm for deadlock detection and recovery. What are the steps involved in the algorithm? (5 marks)

A deadlock situation occurs in a system having two processes P1, P2, P3, and P4. P1 is holding R1 and R2, P2 is holding R2 and R3, P3 is holding R3 and R4, and P4 is holding R4 and R1. Determine whether a deadlock is present in this system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the necessary conditions for deadlock

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'process termination' in the context of deadlock recovery. How does a process terminate and recover from a deadlock situation? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the process termination and recovery in detail
